name: translate
description: Translate text between languages using LLM.
description_for_agent: Translate text from one language to another using LLM. Parameters: text (string, required — text to translate), to_language (string, required — target language name like 'English', 'Russian', 'Spanish'), from_language (string, optional — source language, auto-detected if omitted). Use this when you need to translate text between languages.
